title: Use Column Values inside Automations
excerpt:
Description
Ability to use “assigned person” to a specific task inside a automation - so if i need to change something in my automations i could just re-assign a person to that task - instead of changing 10 automations a…

posts.author: Rasmus7700 (Rasmus Balle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to use “assigned person” to a specific task inside a automation - so if i need to change something in my automations i could just re-assign a person to that task - instead of changing 10 automations after a board is copied

What are you trying to achieve

Easy adapt automations after copying

posts.author: JonahScott (Jonah Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: Great question! I didn’t realize you could use column values like “Assigned Person” dynamically in automations. That would make workflows so much easier and reduce duplicate tasks. Definitely a feature that would save a lot of time!
